connectors.name: mock_erp
connectors.description: Simulates a live ERP feed by replaying seeded invoice history.

connectors.name: csv_drop_folder
connectors.description: Watches F:\ledgerhawk\api\data\dropfolder for new invoice CSVs.

connectors.description: Pulls invoices from a Stripe sandbox account (requires STRIPE_API_KEY).
